headline: Truist Lowers its Price Target on Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (AJG) to $235 from $271
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) is one of the 7 Most Undervalued Blue Chip Stocks to Invest In. On March 18, 2026, Truist lowered the price target on Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) to $235 from $271 previously and maintained a Hold rating, citing valuation pressure across the insurance brokerage peer group. Truist […]
